userStories.story: As a student, I want to log in with email and password so that I can access my personalized learning content
criteria: Given I am on the login page
When I enter valid credentials and click login
Then I am redirected to the home page and see my name in the header

userStories.story: As a student, I want to log out so that I can switch accounts or use the app as a guest
criteria: Then I am redirected to the login page and the auth cookie is cleared

userStories.story: As a guest user, I want to upgrade to an authenticated user so that I can access personalized features
criteria: Given I am using the app as a guest
When I sign up with email
Then I become an authenticated user with access to all features

userStories.story: As a guest, I want to encounter access gates when visiting gated content so that I understand what content requires login
criteria: Given I am a guest user
When I navigate to a mandatory-access course
Then I see a non-dismissible login modal
